name: attenlabs-saa-monorepo
description: Open monorepo for the Attention Labs SAA (Selective Auditory Attention) SDKs and framework adapters.

scripts.test:js: npm run build:js && node --test packages/saa-gate/tests/*.test.mjs packages/saa-proactive-js/tests/*.test.mjs examples/obs-overlay/tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:py
